questions.question: Explain the time complexity of the Bubble Sort algorithm, comparing it to other common sorting algorithms like Selection Sort and Insertion Sort.
Write a step-by-step implementation of the Insertion Sort algorithm for an array of integers, explaining the key differences between your implementation and the standard algorithm.
questions.hint: Draw diagrams or pseudocode to illustrate your steps

questions.question: Discuss the advantages and disadvantages of using Bubble Sort for sorting large datasets. How might you modify the algorithm to improve its performance for such datasets?
questions.hint: Consider the trade-offs between simplicity and efficiency
